tasks.subject: Task 1: Global fullscreen button + consistent parchment frame on selector
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Move the fullscreen button to `index.html` so it's visible on all screens, align its position to the frame inset, and remove the grey `frame-neutral` override from the selector.

**Files:**
- Modify: `index.html`
- Modify: `engine.js`
- Modify: `style.css`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Fullscreen button appears on selector, splash screens, and in-game
- [ ] Button position uses `--frame-inset` not hardcoded `1rem`
- [ ] Selector shows parchment gold frame
- [ ] No duplicate fullscreen button or listener
- [ ] `fullscreenchange` listener wired once at boot

**Verify:** Open in browser. Fullscreen button visible top-right on selector. Gold border frame. Click fullscreen toggles. Start story — button still there.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["index.html", "engine.js", "style.css"], "verifyCommand": "open index.html in browser", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Fullscreen button on all screens", "Frame-inset aligned position", "Parchment frame on selector", "No duplicate listeners"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Intro splash CSS
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add CSS classes for paragraph-based intro splash layout and how-to-play link.

**Files:**
- Modify: `style.css`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `.intro-splash-body` styles paragraphs inside splash
- [ ] `.intro-splash-btn` styles CTA button
- [ ] `.intro-how-to-play` styles selector link

**Verify:** Classes exist in style.css.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["style.css"], "verifyCommand": "grep intro-splash style.css", "acceptanceCriteria": [".intro-splash-body exists", ".intro-splash-btn exists", ".intro-how-to-play exists"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: showIntroSplash() + boot gate + selector link
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement intro splash function, gate boot on `seen_intro`, add How to play link.

**Files:**
- Modify: `engine.js`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] First load shows intro splash
- [ ] Begin sets seen_intro and transitions to selector
- [ ] Subsequent loads skip splash
- [ ] Selector has How to play link
- [ ] How to play shows splash with Close button
- [ ] Close dismisses without re-rendering selector

**Verify:** First load shows splash. Refresh skips it. How to play link works.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["engine.js"], "verifyCommand": "open index.html in browser", "acceptanceCriteria": ["First load shows splash", "seen_intro gates subsequent loads", "How to play link on selector", "Close button dismisses overlay"]}
```
